data.name: Description
data.value: View OpenTelemetry data (logs, spans, traces) from a running AppHost

data.name: LogsDescription
data.value: View structured logs from the Dashboard telemetry API

data.name: SpansDescription
data.value: View spans from the Dashboard telemetry API

data.name: TracesDescription
data.value: View traces from the Dashboard telemetry API

data.name: ResourceArgumentDescription
data.value: Filter by resource name

data.name: FollowOptionDescription
data.value: Stream telemetry in real-time as it arrives

data.name: FormatOptionDescription
data.value: Output format (Table or Json)

data.name: LimitOptionDescription
data.value: Maximum number of items to return

data.name: TraceIdOptionDescription
data.value: Filter by trace ID

data.name: TraceIdArgumentDescription
data.value: The trace ID to view. If not specified, lists all traces.

data.name: SeverityOptionDescription
data.value: Filter logs by minimum severity (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)

data.name: HasErrorOptionDescription
data.value: Filter by error status (true to show only errors, false to exclude errors)

data.name: LimitMustBePositive
data.value: The --limit value must be a positive number.

data.name: DashboardNotAvailable
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The dashboard is not available.

data.name: DashboardNotAvailableHint
data.value: Ensure the AppHost is running with the dashboard enabled.

data.name: FailedToFetchTelemetry
data.value: Failed to fetch telemetry: {0}

data.name: TraceNotFound
data.value: Trace with ID '{0}' was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedContentType
data.value: Dashboard API returned unexpected content type '{0}'. Expected JSON response.

data.name: SelectAppHostAction
data.value: view telemetry for

data.name: HeaderTimestamp
data.value: Timestamp

data.name: HeaderName
data.value: Name

data.name: HeaderDuration
data.value: Duration

data.name: HeaderSpans
data.value: Spans

data.name: HeaderStatus
data.value: Status

data.name: DashboardUrlOptionDescription
data.value: Base URL of a standalone Aspire Dashboard (e.g. http://localhost:18888). Login URLs are also accepted and automatically normalized.

data.name: ApiKeyOptionDescription
data.value: API key for authenticating with the dashboard (optional, for dashboards with API key authentication)

data.name: DashboardUrlAndAppHostExclusive
data.value: The --dashboard-url and --apphost options cannot be used together. Specify one or the other.

data.name: DashboardAuthFailed
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. Authentication failed.

data.name: DashboardAuthFailedHint
data.value: Authenticate with the dashboard either with a --dashboard-url including a valid login token (e.g. http://localhost:18888/login?t=TOKEN), or with an --api-key matching the dashboard's configured API key.

data.name: DashboardAuthFailedAnonymousHint
data.value: Alternatively, allow anonymous access with 'aspire dashboard run --allow-anonymous' or by setting the ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS environment variable to true.

data.name: DashboardUrlNotReachable
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The specified URL '{0}' does not appear to be a valid dashboard address.

data.name: DashboardUrlNotReachableHint
data.value: Verify the URL is correct.

data.name: DashboardApiNotEnabled
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The dashboard at '{0}' does not have the telemetry API enabled.

data.name: DashboardApiNotEnabledHint
data.value: Start the dashboard with 'aspire dashboard run' or set Dashboard:Api:Enabled to true.

data.name: DashboardConnectionFailed
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. Unable to connect to '{0}'.

data.name: DashboardConnectionFailedHint
data.value: Verify the dashboard is running and the URL is correct.

data.name: DashboardUrlInvalid
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The value '{0}' is not a valid URL.

data.name: DashboardUrlInvalidHint
data.value: Specify an absolute URL like 'http://localhost:18888'.

data.name: DashboardLoginTokenFailed
data.value: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The login token in the URL is invalid or expired.

data.name: DashboardLoginTokenFailedHint
data.value: Ensure you are using the login URL from the currently running dashboard instance.

data.name: DashboardLoginTokenFailedAnonymousHint
data.value: Alternatively, allow anonymous access with 'aspire dashboard run --allow-anonymous' or by setting the ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS environment variable to true.
